blurb_en:
What Higgsfield AI calls the world's first AI feature film premiered in Cannes this week — at a third-party industry event in the city, not the official festival program, a distinction the Cannes festival spokesperson was quick to supply.
• A team of 15 directors, DPs, and editors built the 95-minute sci-fi heist film Hell Grind in 14 days for under $500,000; Higgsfield claims the equivalent traditional production would have cost $50 million.
• The first 25 minutes alone required 16,181 video generations; 253 shots made the cut — a 64:1 cull ratio.
• The story involves street thieves, a portal to the underworld, a Tibetan temple, and feudal Japan. Call it ambitious.
• For Insta360: AI filmmaking tools are now producing feature-length content, and the production teams using them are directly competing for the same creative budgets as those booking real shoots with real cameras.
• 64 video generations for every shot that made the final cut. The editor, it turns out, was the hardest job to replace.
blurb_zh:
Higgsfield AI自称史上首部AI长片，Hell Grind本周在戛纳举行首映——在城里一个第三方行业活动上，而非官方电影节项目，戛纳官方发言人特别澄清了这一区别。
• 15人团队，14天时间，预算不到50万美元，拍出了这部95分钟的科幻劫案电影；Higgsfield表示，传统方式制作同类影片成本高达5000万美元。
• 仅前25分钟就生成了16,181个视频片段，最终采用253个镜头，淘汰率64:1。
• 故事讲述街头劫匪、地狱入口、西藏神庙和日本封建时代。野心不小。
• 对Insta360的意义：AI影视工具已能产出院线长度的内容，使用这些工具的制作团队，正在与使用摄影机和实地拍摄的团队争夺同一批创作预算。
• 每个最终入选的镜头背后，有64个被淘汰的生成结果。原来最难被替代的，是剪辑师。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Screen Daily, AV Club, World of Reel, and No Film School. $50M cost claim is Higgsfield's own estimate, not independently verified. 64:1 generation ratio from No Film School coverage. Official Cannes non-involvement confirmed across multiple sources.

blurb_en:
Pope Leo XIV published Magnifica Humanitas — a 235-page papal encyclical on artificial intelligence — on May 25, and co-presented it at the Vatican alongside Christopher Olah, co-founder of Anthropic and head of its AI interpretability research.
• The document runs 42,300 words and addresses AI in autonomous weapons, labor displacement, and the concentration of power in technology companies.
• It explicitly rejects transhumanism and posthumanism — the ideas that technology can help humans transcend biological limits, or dissolve the boundary between humans and machines.
• The document is framed as a continuation of Catholic social teaching since 1891's Rerum Novarum on workers' rights — the Pope is updating the labor encyclical for the age of LLMs.
• For Insta360: the encyclical directly addresses AI's impact on creative work and visual culture — the same terrain occupied by every AI image and video tool launched in the past two years.
• Anthropic has consistently refused US government pressure to remove safety guardrails for lethal autonomous weapons. Of all the AI companies that could have been handed this platform, it went to the one that kept saying no.
blurb_zh:
教皇利奥十四世于5月25日发布《人类的伟大》（Magnifica Humanitas）——一份235页的AI通谕——并在梵蒂冈与Anthropic联合创始人、可解释性研究负责人Christopher Olah共同发布。
• 文件长达42,300字，涉及AI自主武器、劳动力替代以及科技公司权力集中等议题。
• 文件明确反对「超人类主义」和「后人类主义」——即利用技术让人类超越生物限制、或模糊人机边界的理念。
• 文件将当前议题纳入教会劳工社会训导传统，追溯至1891年的《新事通谕》——教皇正在为大语言模型时代更新劳工通谕。
• 对Insta360的意义：通谕直接论及AI对创意工作和视觉文化的影响——这也是近两年每款AI图像和视频工具所涉足的领域。
• Anthropic多次拒绝美国政府要求放开致命自主武器安全护栏的压力。所有AI公司中，偏偏是这家说得最多「不」的，站上了梵蒂冈的讲台。
verification_notes: Confirmed via NPR, CNN, Vatican News, PBS NewsHour, National Catholic Reporter. Christopher Olah's role at Anthropic verified via CNBC and eWeek. Encyclical text available at vatican.va. Document length (235 pages, 42,300 words) confirmed across multiple sources.

blurb_en:
Starting May 14, Figure AI livestreamed three F.03 humanoid robots sorting packages for more than 100 consecutive hours — no remote operators, no teleoperation, running entirely on the Helix-02 onboard neural network.
• The robots sorted more than 100,000 packages over the course of the stream, which kept running after it went viral on X.
• In a 10-hour Man vs. Machine contest, intern Aime Gerard edged the robots 12,924 packages to 12,732 — 2.79 seconds per package to the machines' 2.83.
• A rival exec from Agility Robotics called the demo "more like a science project." The robots had no comment.
• For Insta360: Figure's Helix-02 system handles real-time barcode scanning and object manipulation autonomously in uncontrolled environments — the same class of on-device visual AI driving advances in action camera and 360-degree camera intelligence.
• An intern won. By 192 packages. For now.
blurb_zh:
从5月14日起，Figure AI对三台F.03人形机器人进行直播，机器人连续分拣包裹超过100小时——无远程操控，无人工干预，全程依靠Helix-02机载神经网络自主运行。
• 直播期间，机器人共分拣超过10万件包裹，视频在X平台走红后，公司决定继续播出。
• 在一场10小时「人机对决」中，实习生Aime Gerard以12,924比12,732件的比分险胜机器人——每件用时2.79秒对2.83秒。
• 竞争对手Agility Robotics的高管称此次演示「更像一个科展项目」。机器人无回应。
• 对Insta360的意义：Figure的Helix-02系统能在非受控环境中自主完成条形码扫描和物体操控，与推动运动相机和全景相机智能化升级的机载视觉AI属于同一技术门类。
• 实习生赢了。差距192件包裹。暂时。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechRadar, Technology.org, Seoul Economic Daily, InterestingEngineering, and multiple secondary sources. 100,000+ package count and 100+ hour duration corroborated across multiple reports. Human vs. robot contest details confirmed. Agility Robotics skeptic quote from secondary sources.

blurb_en:
Spotify and Universal Music Group announced a licensing deal on May 21 allowing Premium subscribers to use generative AI to create covers and remixes of participating artists' songs — and for the first time in AI music history, the artists were actually asked.
• The tool will launch as a paid add-on for Spotify Premium; no pricing or launch date has been confirmed.
• Participation is opt-in for artists and songwriters, who receive a usage-based revenue share each time their music is covered or remixed.
• The deal covers both recorded music and music publishing rights, spanning UMG's catalog across genres.
• For Insta360: AI-generated audio is entering licensed creative workflows — the same kind of tool being integrated into AI video platforms the Insta360 community uses for editing and sharing.
• Every AI music company that trained on unlicensed data just watched a competitor build the same product by asking permission first.
blurb_zh:
5月21日，Spotify与环球音乐集团宣布达成授权协议，允许Premium用户使用生成式AI为参与计划的艺人歌曲制作翻唱和混音——这是AI音乐史上，第一次正式征得了艺人的同意。
• 该功能将作为Spotify Premium付费附加服务推出，具体定价和上线时间尚未公布。
• 艺人和词曲作者自愿参与，每次其音乐被翻唱或混音即可按使用量获得收益分成。
• 协议同时涵盖录音与音乐出版权利，包括环球旗下各风格艺人的曲库。
• 对Insta360的意义：AI生成音频正进入获授权的创意工作流——类似工具已被集成到Insta360社区用户用于剪辑和分享AI视频的平台中。
• 那些用未授权数据训练模型的AI音乐公司，刚刚亲眼看着有人先问了一句「可以吗」，然后做出了同样的产品。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch, Billboard, Spotify official newsroom (newsroom.spotify.com), Music Business Worldwide, Hollywood Reporter. Deal announced May 21, 2026. No pricing or launch date confirmed per multiple sources. Opt-in model and revenue share structure confirmed across sources.
